name: Norddampf Relict Capsule Caddy with 4x Dosing Capsules
summary: The Norddampf Relict Capsule is the ideal companion for RELICT vaporiser users who value organisation, durability, and discreet portability.
description: The Norddampf Relict Capsule is the ideal companion for RELICT vaporiser users who value organisation, durability, and discreet portability. Engineered to store up to 4 stainless steel dosing capsules, this compact case keeps your pre-filled sessions secure, fresh, and ready whenever you are. Whether you're heading out or storing your capsules for later, the Relict Capsule ensures they're protected from debris, moisture, and odour. Purpose-built for convenience and longevity, this rugged storage solution is designed for life on the move and now ships pre-loaded with 4 dosing capsules: A practical part to keep your device working as it should.

specs.label: Material
specs.value: Aluminium Alloy (capsule case), Stainless Steel (dosing capsules)
